description: A public singleton settings record for one user's sticky quote canvas preferences.

main.description: Optional per-user canvas settings. Use record key `self`; do not store note IDs here because quote records are listed by collection.

$type.description: Record type discriminator. Must match this lexicon ID.

schemaVersion.description: Record schema version. Version 1 is the initial canvas settings shape.

defaultColor.description: Optional default sticky note color token from the fixed palette.

lastViewport.description: Optional last viewport center and zoom for restoring a user's canvas view.

updatedAt.description: ISO datetime when this settings record was last changed.

lastViewport.description: Last known viewport center in world coordinates and zoom as a fixed-point integer.

x.description: World x-coordinate at the viewport center.

y.description: World y-coordinate at the viewport center.

zoomX1000.description: Viewport zoom multiplier stored as zoom * 1000. A value of 1000 means 1.0x.
